commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 5. "Thou shalt bring Me out of this trap, which they have hidden for Me" (ver. 4). Thou shalt bring Me out of these snares, which they have hidden for Me. "For Thou art My Protector."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Snare. The order to appear at court, after Saul had manifested his ill-will, could be considered in no other light. (Calmet)
